name: BernieSanders.com
subject: Incredible response Fwd: Pfizer
body:
#
I wanted to make sure you saw Bernie's email yesterday about how we can stop the Big Pharma company Pfizer from dodging out on $35 BILLION in taxes it owes America. [**Please read Bernie's note below and add your name to help stop Pfizer from dodging $35 billion in taxes.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/pfizer-must-pay-taxes?source=em160319-ns-full "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/pfizer-must-pay-taxes?source=em160319-ns-full")
* * *
_Email from Senator Bernie Sanders:_
I want to tell you about something that encapsulates so much of what is wrong with our economy, our government, and our corrupt political system. Then I'm going to ask for your help to stop it.
Pfizer is a giant pharmaceutical company based in New York City that has a history of overcharging Americans for prescription drugs. It's in the process of trying to merge with another company located in Ireland.
**If the merger is successful, Pfizer would technically become a foreign company, meaning it could dodge around $35 BILLION in corporate taxes here in America.**
Enough is enough. Pfizer and other pharmaceutical companies cannot be allowed to evade taxes and rip off American patients who already pay the highest prices in the world for prescription drugs.
[**I sent a letter to Treasury Secretary Jack Lew asking him to prevent Pfizer from taking many of the steps it wants in order to avoid paying taxes in America. Can you add your name to say you want Pfizer to pay the taxes it owes?**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/pfizer-must-pay-taxes?source=em160319-ns-full "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/pfizer-must-pay-taxes?source=em160319-ns-full")
**[Add your name»](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/pfizer-must-pay-taxes?source=em160319-ns-full "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/pfizer-must-pay-taxes?source=em160319-ns-full")**
What Pfizer is trying to do is known as a "corporate inversion." In this case, Pfizer, an American company, is merging with a company based abroad. The result of the merger is a company with an address in another country - even though the majority of shareholders are still based in America.
Pfizer apparently doesn't want to pay the $35 billion in taxes it would owe in America. I don't think that's right.
No matter what, you can bet that Pfizer would continue to overcharge Americans for prescription drugs, too. Since 2014, the pharmaceutical company has hiked the prices of seven of its top selling drugs by an average of 39 percent.
Pfizer also charges 12 times as much in the U.S. under Medicare for these drugs as it charges in Ireland, where it's claiming a new address for tax purposes.
All of this is the result of years of weakened tax laws, an abdication of responsibility by American companies to their country, and a corrupt political system that allows it to happen.
And I believe we can stop it.
[**Add your name and together we can stop Pfizer's corporate tax dodge and take a big step forward for our political revolution.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/pfizer-must-pay-taxes?source=em160319-ns-full "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/pfizer-must-pay-taxes?source=em160319-ns-full")
Thank you for your support.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets_go_bernie?refcode=em160319pfizer-ns "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets_go_bernie?refcode=em160319pfizer-ns")**

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: Rand Paul
subject: We need an apology
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate
body:
Dear Patriot,

Whenever you hear Hillary Clinton speak the
truth, it's usually by accident.
I suspect that's what happened Sunday when
she told a crowd of supporters, "We're going to put a lot of coal
miners and coal companies out of business."

Patriot, shouldn't our elected officials be
spending more time trying to put people back to work instead of
figuring out new ways to destroy jobs?

I think so.

And if you agree, I must be able to count on
your most generous contribution of $50, $25 or even $10 right
away.

Will you sign my
petition to support coal and save jobs?

Coal has long been critical to Kentucky's
economy.

From power generation, to steel production,
to water purification, to carbon fiber and silicon metal, coal's
uses are almost too many to list.

Yet, this industry is being continually
targeted by radical environmentalists and their pals in the
Democrat Party who are now openly admitting their goal is to use
the power of government to put people out of work!

Patriot, the more restrictions we put on
American energy production -- including coal -- the more we're
hamstringing our fragile economy, the more dependent we become on
foreign sources of energy and the harder it's going to be to dig
ourselves out of $19 TRILLION in debt.

Every day in the U.S. Senate, I'm fighting to
lift outrageous restrictions on American energy production --
including Kentucky coal.

I believe, if we are going to turn our
country around -- and restore freedom and economic prosperity in
America -- coal and the wonderful men and women who work in this
industry are going to play a vital role.

I'm fighting hard for them every day in the
U.S. Senate.

I'm asking you to stand with me by making
your most generous contribution of $50, $25 or even $10 right
away.

In liberty,
Rand Paul

Pitch in $25 TODAY >>

Pitch in $50 TODAY >>

Pitch in $75 TODAY >>

Pitch in $100 TODAY
>>

Or donate another
amount >>

Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate

name: Beth Hansen, Campaign Manager
subject: The latest
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich for America
body:
Memo: The Latest
From: Beth Hansen, Campaign
Manager

Governor John Kasich had a big
win in Ohio last Tuesday and gathered more delegates in Illinois
and North Carolina - outpacing Ted Cruz by 80-51. In Ohio, Gov.
Kasich defeated Trump with a double-digit lead. It was a major
milestone in resetting the race as our positive and
solutions-driven strategy overcame the Trump insult machine.

Now with the electoral map
shifting significantly in our favor, Gov. Kasich is in a strong
position to accumulate a large share of the almost 1,000
delegates and enter Cleveland with the momentum we'll need to
win. With your help, we will continue to inform voters and the
pundits that not only is Gov. Kasich the lone candidate who is
focused on working to bring real, achievable solutions to the
American people, but he's also the ONLY Republican in the race
who can defeat Hillary Clinton.

Below you will find the latest
updates from the campaign trail. As always, thank you for your
ongoing efforts and support.

The Strongest Against Hillary
Clinton

In case you missed it, Politico
released a survey where 45% of respondents said that Gov. Kasich
is the best Republican candidate to go on and defeat Hillary
Clinton this fall, finishing 12-points ahead of Cruz and a
whopping 23-points ahead of Trump!

The Sunday Shows

Gov. Kasich appeared on four
shows this morning to discuss our strategy to continue winning
delegates, secure the nomination and ultimately go on to defeat
Hillary Clinton this fall. Here are links to watch those
interviews:

NBC - Meet the Press
CNN - State of the Union
CBS - Face The Nation
FOX - Fox News Sunday

Campaigning in Utah

Gov. Kasich was in Utah on Friday
and Saturday for four Town Hall events, drawing huge crowds &
media attention at all of them! We have a great leadership team
positioned in the state and we expect a strong finish in the Utah
Caucus on Tuesday.

Gov. Kasich to Speak at AIPAC

On Monday, Gov. Kasich will speak
at the 2016 AIPAC Policy Conference in Washington, D.C at 5:15pm.
Please follow us on Twitter for more details tomorrow about how
to watch live.

Deployment to Wisconsin

Following Utah, the next focus
will be on Wisconsin, which votes on April 5th. Hundreds of
volunteers traveled to New Hampshire, South Carolina, Michigan
and Ohio to help with our critical grassroots programs. Now we're
headed to Wisconsin!

If you think you might be
available to help, please sign up to learn more:
JohnKasich.com/WisconsinDeployment

Endorsements & Team News:

Kasich for America Announces
Expansion of Arizona Leadership Team

Washington Post: Kasich Recruits
New Big Money Bundlers to His Campaign

Kasich for America Launches New
Utah Web Ad Featuring Gov. Mitt Romney

ENDORSEMENT: Former Utah
Congressman Jim Hansen Supports John Kasich for President

Kasich for America Announces
Arizona Leadership Team

Arizona Republic Endorses John
Kasich

Kasich for America Announces
Expansion of Utah Leadership Team

ENDORSEMENT: Former U.S. Senator
Bob Bennett Supports John Kasich for President

Kasich Challenges Trump on
Twitter Over Riot Remarks

Kasich to Appear on Pennsylvania
Ballot Even Though Trump Swore Kasich 'Cannot Run in The State'

ENDORSEMENT: Mike Leavitt
Supports Ohio Governor John Kasich for President

ENDORSEMENT: U.S. Senator Jim
Inhofe Endorses John Kasich for President

ASSOCIATED PRESS: Cruz has no
realistic path

The Boston Globe- "Finally, Some
Clarity in the GOP Race"

ENDORSEMENT: Former Wisconsin
Congressman Mark Neumann Supports John Kasich for President

Why John Kasich is the Only One
Who Can Stop Donald Trump

Kasich for America Announces
Expansion of National Strategy Council

Former Wisconsin Congressman
Scott Klug Joins Kasich For America Steering Committee

ENDORSEMENT: In Texas, Steve
Bartlett Endorses John Kasich for President

Former Ohio State Football
Coaches Jim Tressel, John Cooper Earle Bruce & Luke Fickell
Support John Kasich for President

Kasich for America Announces Utah
Leadership Team

Gov. Tommy Thompson to Chair
Kasich for America Wisconsin Campaign

Paid for by Kasich for America
JohnKasich.com

name: Joe Sestak
subject: 21 percent
body:
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719475/3476a20e/c6384fa/2745bcb5/3566877442/VEsH/ "http://joesestak.com")
---

Having come from a big family with 6 sisters, I can tell you that the world is changing for the better because of the leadership and accomplishments of so many women like them. My 14-year-old daughter has great role models in my sisters and her mother, but how wrong that she and every other young woman faces the prospect of entering a workforce where women earn less than their male coworkers. | [](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719475/3476a20e/c6384fa/2745bcb4/3566877442/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM031801FBb1")
---
In fact, here in Pennsylvania, women earn 21 percent less. The impact of this pay gap is especially troubling when you consider that over 600,000 family households in PA are headed by women.
Pennsylvanians deserve a Senator with an actual, proven record of accomplishment in addressing the pay gap, and I am proud of the record I achieved while in Congress:
* Cosponsored and voted for the Paycheck Fairness Act
* Cosponsored and voted for the Lilly Ledbetter Fair Pay Act
* Voted to raise the minimum wage by $1.40 to $7.25
* Introduced and passed in the House legislation to strengthen Small Business Administration (SBA) programs for small business development centers to help the 30 percent of small businesses that are owned by women to continue to develop
* Voted for and passed legislation which would expand opportunities for women-owned businesses by requiring the SBA Administrator to conduct a study identifying where women-owned small businesses are underrepresented in federal contracting

[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719475/3476a20e/c6384fa/2745bcb3/3566877442/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM031801FBb2")
---
I am also proud to have introduced legislation of my own, the Gender Equity Act of 2010, which offered several major policy initiatives to help achieve the following goals:
* Adopt fair paid leave practices, including a minimum number of paid family and medical leave days;
* Support for domestic violence victims;
* End maternity discrimination;
* Expand child care tax aid;
* Provide social security for caretakers;
* Keep women in Science, Technology, Engineering and Mathematics ("STEM") fields;
* Offer flexible work options;
* Stop caps on gender discrimination damages; and
* Encourage entrepreneurship

[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719475/3476a20e/c6384fa/2745bcb2/3566877442/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM031801FBb3")
---
And when it came to women's health issues, I was a ready warrior for women:
* Voted in favor of and championed the Affordable Care Act which provides free preventive screenings for women, increased services such as pre-natal care for pregnant women, and ensures women with pre-existing conditions are not denied coverage
* Co-sponsored legislation to fund family-planning programs and help teenagers and rape survivors access emergency contraception
* Co-sponsored and passed legislation requiring health plans to cover a minimum hospital stay of two days for mastectomies and other breast cancer treatments
* Cosponsored the International Violence Against Women Act

[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719475/3476a20e/c6384fa/2745bcb1/3566877442/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM031801FBb4")
---
During this Senate race, I have made women's issues a cornerstone of my campaign. Below, please find the op-eds I published on women's issues, as well as my [Plan for Restoring the American Dream for Working Families](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719475/3476a20e/c6384fa/2745bcb0/3566877442/VEsA/ "http://joesestak.com/wp/wp-content/uploads/2016/01/Plan%20for%20Restoring%20the%20American%20Dream%20for%20Working%20Families.pdf"), and a listing of some of the events I have done on these critical issues:

On March 6, 2015, I held an event on domestic violence and human trafficking in Bucks County as part of my 422-mile walk across the state: [http://joesestak.com/stop/bucks-county/](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719475/3476a20e/c6384fa/2745bcbf/3566877442/VEsB/ "http://joesestak.com/stop/bucks-county/")

On March 9, 2015, I held an event on women's issues in Chester County as part of my 422-mile walk across the state: [http://joesestak.com/stop/chester-county/](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719475/3476a20e/c6384fa/2745bcbe/3566877442/VEsO/ "http://joesestak.com/stop/chester-county/")

On March 19, 2015, I held an event on families and single parents in Bedford County as part of my 422-mile walk across the state: [http://joesestak.com/stop/bedford-county/](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719475/3476a20e/c6384fa/2745bcbd/3566877442/VEsP/ "http://joesestak.com/stop/bedford-county/")

On March 25, 2015, I held an event on working families and labor in Westmoreland County as part of my 422-mile walk across the state: [http://joesestak.com/stop/westmoreland-county-3/](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719475/3476a20e/c6384fa/2745bcbc/3566877442/VEsHBQ/ "http://joesestak.com/stop/westmoreland-county-3/")

On December 16, 2015, I discussed policies I will pursue in the Senate to empower working families at Dress for Success Lackawanna, a non-profit that helps connect women with employment resources: [http://joesestak.com/admiral-sestak-outlines-how-hell-fight-for-working-families-learns-hopes-concerns-of-scranton-community-groups/](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719475/3476a20e/c6384fa/2745bcbb/3566877442/VEsHBA/ "http://joesestak.com/admiral-sestak-outlines-how-hell-fight-for-working-families-learns-hopes-concerns-of-scranton-community-groups/")

I have been [a vocal advocate for ending human trafficking](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719475/3476a20e/c6384fa/2745bcba/3566877442/VEsHBw/ "http://www.goerie.com/article/20140709/OPINION08/307099993/we-must-stop-human-trafficking-guest-voice-of-joe-sestak") and passing the International Violence Against Women Act that I fought for in Congress, and I have also [written extensively on women's issues](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719475/3476a20e/c6384fa/2745bcb9/3566877442/VEsHBg/ "http://www.delcotimes.com/opinion/20140821/guest-column-time-to-stop-the-violence-and-bias-against-women") and how I will fight for them in the Senate.

This January, I released my comprehensive [Plan for Restoring the American Dream for Working Families](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719475/3476a20e/c6384fa/2745bcb0/3566877442/VEsHAQ/ "http://joesestak.com/wp/wp-content/uploads/2016/01/Plan%20for%20Restoring%20the%20American%20Dream%20for%20Working%20Families.pdf"), which covers a wide range of issues, [including paid family and medical leave, raising wages for all workers](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719475/3476a20e/c6384fa/2745bcb8/3566877442/VEsHAA/ "http://joesestak.com/wp/wp-content/uploads/2016/01/Workplace-Protections.pdf"), creating [federal requirements for paid sick days, affordable childcare, educational opportunities for women](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719475/3476a20e/c6384fa/2745bca7/3566877442/VEsHAw/ "http://joesestak.com/wp/wp-content/uploads/2016/01/Investing-in-Education-Pays-the-Best-Interest.pdf") in STEM and other areas, [protecting women's healthcare](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719475/3476a20e/c6384fa/2745bca6/3566877442/VEsHAg/ "http://joesestak.com/wp/wp-content/uploads/2016/01/A-Health-Security-Strategy.pdf"), and supporting [small businesses and entrepreneurial opportunities for women.](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719475/3476a20e/c6384fa/2745bca5/3566877442/VEsHDQ/ "http://joesestak.com/wp/wp-content/uploads/2016/01/Creating-Jobs-through-Small-Business-Growth.pdf")
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719475/3476a20e/c6384fa/2745bca4/3566877442/VEsHDA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM031801FBb5")
---
**For additional information, please refer to the following:

End Gender Discrimination in Pay**
* **March 2015:** [Contrast Sheet on Gender Pay Gap](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719475/3476a20e/c6384fa/2745bca3/3566877442/VEsEBQ/ "http://joesestak.com/wp/wp-content/uploads/2015/03/Women-Contrast-Sheet2.pdf")
* **January 2016: **[Workplace Protections: Take Care of York Crew, Take Care of the Mission](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719475/3476a20e/c6384fa/2745bcb8/3566877442/VEsEBA/ "http://joesestak.com/wp/wp-content/uploads/2016/01/Workplace-Protections.pdf")

**Paid Family and Medical Leave**
* **November 2015** : [Admiral Joe Sestak Calls for National Paid Family Leave](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719475/3476a20e/c6384fa/2745bca2/3566877442/VEsEBw/ "http://joesestak.com/admiral-joe-sestak-calls-for-national-paid-family-leave-program/")
* **January 2016:** [Workplace Protections: Take Care of York Crew, Take Care of the Mission](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719475/3476a20e/c6384fa/2745bcb8/3566877442/VEsEBg/ "http://joesestak.com/wp/wp-content/uploads/2016/01/Workplace-Protections.pdf")

**Raise Wages for All Workers**
* **January 2016:** [Raising All Wages, Not Just the Minimum Wage](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719475/3476a20e/c6384fa/2745bca1/3566877442/VEsEAQ/ "http://joesestak.com/wp/wp-content/uploads/2016/01/Raising-All-Wages.pdf")
* **February 2014:** [Making the Case for Raising the Minimum Wage (Op-Ed)](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719475/3476a20e/c6384fa/2745bca0/3566877442/VEsEAA/ "http://www.huffingtonpost.com/rep-joe-sestak/making-the-case-for-raisi_b_4804116.html")
* **March 2015:** Walking in Your Shoes to Restore the American Dream, Chapter 5

**Allow Workers to Earn Paid Sick and Safe Days**
* **January 2016:** Workplace Protections: [Take Care of York Crew, Take Care of the Mission](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719475/3476a20e/c6384fa/2745bcb8/3566877442/VEsEAw/ "http://joesestak.com/wp/wp-content/uploads/2016/01/Workplace-Protections.pdf")
* **January 2016:**[ In Bryn Mawr, Admiral Joe Sestak Unveils "Plan for Restoring the American Dream for Working Families"](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719475/3476a20e/c6384fa/2745bcaf/3566877442/VEsEAg/ "http://joesestak.com/in-bryn-mawr-admiral-joe-sestak-unveils-plan-for-restoring-the-american-dream-for-working-families-event-7-of-7/")

**Make Childcare Affordable for All**
* **January 2016:** [Raising All Wages, Not Just the Minimum Wage](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719475/3476a20e/c6384fa/2745bca1/3566877442/VEsEDQ/ "http://joesestak.com/wp/wp-content/uploads/2016/01/Raising-All-Wages.pdf")
* **January 2016:** [In Harrisburg, Admiral Joe Sestak Unveils "Plan for Restoring the American Dream for Working Families"](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719475/3476a20e/c6384fa/2745bcae/3566877442/VEsEDA/ "http://joesestak.com/in-harrisburg-admiral-joe-sestak-unveils-plan-for-restoring-the-american-dream-for-working-families-event-4-of-7/")

**Protecting Women 's Health**
* **July 2014:** [We Must Stop Human Trafficking (Op-Ed)](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719475/3476a20e/c6384fa/2745bcba/3566877442/VEsFBQ/ "http://www.goerie.com/article/20140709/OPINION08/307099993/we-must-stop-human-trafficking-guest-voice-of-joe-sestak")
* **August 2014:** [Time to Stop the Violence and Bias Against Women (Op-Ed)](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719475/3476a20e/c6384fa/2745bcb9/3566877442/VEsFBA/ "http://www.delcotimes.com/opinion/20140821/guest-column-time-to-stop-the-violence-and-bias-against-women")
* **March 2015:** [Contrast Sheet on Women's Health](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719475/3476a20e/c6384fa/2745bca3/3566877442/VEsFBw/ "http://joesestak.com/wp/wp-content/uploads/2015/03/Women-Contrast-Sheet2.pdf")
* **March 2015:** Walking in Your Shoes to Restore the American Dream, Chapter 7
* **October 2015: **[Will Toomey Reverse His Harmful Votes Against Women with Breast Cancer](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719475/3476a20e/c6384fa/2745bcad/3566877442/VEsFBg/ "http://joesestak.com/will-toomey-reverse-his-harmful-votes-against-women-with-breast-cancer/")
* **December 2015:** [Toomey Votes to Strip 430,000 Pennsylvanians of Health Care Coverage](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719475/3476a20e/c6384fa/2745bcac/3566877442/VEsFAQ/ "http://joesestak.com/toomey-votes-to-strip-430000-pennsylvanians-of-health-care-coverage/")
* J**anuary 2016:** [A Health Security Strategy](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719475/3476a20e/c6384fa/2745bca6/3566877442/VEsFAA/ "http://joesestak.com/wp/wp-content/uploads/2016/01/A-Health-Security-Strategy.pdf")

**Support Women Owned Small Businesses**
* **March 2015:** [Contrast Sheet on Women Business Owners](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719475/3476a20e/c6384fa/2745bca3/3566877442/VEsFAw/ "http://joesestak.com/wp/wp-content/uploads/2015/03/Women-Contrast-Sheet2.pdf")
* **December 2015:** [Admiral Sestak Outlines How He'll Fight for Working Families, Learns Hopes and Concerns of Scranton Community Groups](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719475/3476a20e/c6384fa/2745bcbb/3566877442/VEsFAg/ "http://joesestak.com/admiral-sestak-outlines-how-hell-fight-for-working-families-learns-hopes-concerns-of-scranton-community-groups/")
* **January 2016:** [In Bryn Mawr, Admiral Joe Sestak Unveils "Plan for Restoring the American Dream for Working Families"](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719475/3476a20e/c6384fa/2745bcaf/3566877442/VEsFDQ/ "http://joesestak.com/in-bryn-mawr-admiral-joe-sestak-unveils-plan-for-restoring-the-american-dream-for-working-families-event-7-of-7/")

Warmly,
Joe

| [](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719475/3476a20e/c6384fa/2745bcab/3566877442/VEsFDA/ "https://www.facebook.com/joesestak")[

clean_body: "" Having come from a big family with 6 sisters, I can tell you that the world is changing for the better because of the leadership and accomplishments of so many women like them. My 14-year-old daughter has great role models in my sisters and her mother, but how wrong that she and every other young woman faces the prospect of entering a workforce where women earn less than their male coworkers. | "" In fact, here in Pennsylvania, women earn 21 percent less. The impact of this pay gap is especially troubling when you consider that over 600,000 family households in PA are headed by women. Pennsylvanians deserve a Senator with an actual, proven record of accomplishment in addressing the pay gap, and I am proud of the record I achieved while in Congress: Cosponsored and voted for the Paycheck Fairness Act Cosponsored and voted for the Lilly Ledbetter Fair Pay Act Voted to raise the minimum wage by $1.40 to $7.25 Introduced and passed in the House legislation to strengthen Small Business Administration (SBA) programs for small business development centers to help the 30 percent of small businesses that are owned by women to continue to develop Voted for and passed legislation which would expand opportunities for women-owned businesses by requiring the SBA Administrator to conduct a study identifying where women-owned small businesses are underrepresented in federal contracting "" I am also proud to have introduced legislation of my own, the Gender Equity Act of 2010, which offered several major policy initiatives to help achieve the following goals: Adopt fair paid leave practices, including a minimum number of paid family and medical leave days; Support for domestic violence victims; End maternity discrimination; Expand child care tax aid; Provide social security for caretakers; Keep women in Science, Technology, Engineering and Mathematics ("STEM") fields; Offer flexible work options; Stop caps on gender discrimination damages; and Encourage entrepreneurship "" And when it came to women's health issues, I was a ready warrior for women: Voted in favor of and championed the Affordable Care Act which provides free preventive screenings for women, increased services such as pre-natal care for pregnant women, and ensures women with pre-existing conditions are not denied coverage Co-sponsored legislation to fund family-planning programs and help teenagers and rape survivors access emergency contraception Co-sponsored and passed legislation requiring health plans to cover a minimum hospital stay of two days for mastectomies and other breast cancer treatments Cosponsored the International Violence Against Women Act "" During this Senate race, I have made women's issues a cornerstone of my campaign. Below, please find the op-eds I published on women's issues, as well as my "", and a listing of some of the events I have done on these critical issues: On March 6, 2015, I held an event on domestic violence and human trafficking in Bucks County as part of my 422-mile walk across the state: "" On March 9, 2015, I held an event on women's issues in Chester County as part of my 422-mile walk across the state: "" On March 19, 2015, I held an event on families and single parents in Bedford County as part of my 422-mile walk across the state: "" On March 25, 2015, I held an event on working families and labor in Westmoreland County as part of my 422-mile walk across the state: "" On December 16, 2015, I discussed policies I will pursue in the Senate to empower working families at Dress for Success Lackawanna, a non-profit that helps connect women with employment resources: "" I have been "" and passing the International Violence Against Women Act that I fought for in Congress, and I have also "" and how I will fight for them in the Senate. This January, I released my comprehensive "", which covers a wide range of issues, "", creating "" in STEM and other areas, "", and supporting "" "" For additional information, please refer to the following: End Gender Discrimination in Pay March 2015: "" January 2016: "" Paid Family and Medical Leave November 2015 : "" January 2016: "" Raise Wages for All Workers January 2016: "" February 2014: "" March 2015: Walking in Your Shoes to Restore the American Dream, Chapter 5 Allow Workers to Earn Paid Sick and Safe Days January 2016: Workplace Protections: "" January 2016: "" Make Childcare Affordable for All January 2016: "" January 2016: "" Protecting Women 's Health July 2014: "" August 2014: "" March 2015: "" March 2015: Walking in Your Shoes to Restore the American Dream, Chapter 7 October 2015: "" December 2015: "" January 2016: "" Support Women Owned Small Businesses March 2015: "" December 2015: "" January 2016:** "" Warmly, Joe | "" "" "" | ---|---|--- | Friends of Joe Sestak P.O. Box 1936 Media, PA 19063 | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | "" |

name: Katie
subject: One month out
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/5788984911297773568/353836035957850112?refcode=e20160320&refcode2=e20160320nd&amount=25)
---
I'm so proud, Friend --

Together we've built this campaign from the ground up. Everything we've accomplished is because of supporters like you.

**But we can 't stop now. We are now just one month from the primary election -- which means we only have a few short weeks to get our message out there to Pennsylvanians.

Our campaign has set an ambitious goal of raising $15,000 by midnight on Thursday, so we can keep reaching out to every undecided voter before the primary.

[Can I count on you to chip in $5 now and help us reach our ambitious goal?](https://act.myngp.com/el/5788984911297773568/353836035957850112?refcode=e20160320&refcode2=e20160320nd&amount=25) 60% of Pennsylvanians are still undecided about who they're voting for - but we've seen time and time again that when this team sets out to accomplish our goals, there's nothing we can't achieve.**

I've seen the power of our grassroots base and if we keep fighting the way we have since we started this campaign nearly eight months ago, not only will we win our primary, but we will beat Pat Toomey in November. Can I count on you in these last few weeks to help us make it there?

Please, we're almost out of time. [**Chip in $5 and help us reach our fundraising goal as we head into the final stretch until Primary Day.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/5788984911297773568/353836035957850112?refcode=e20160320&refcode2=e20160320nd&amount=25)

Thank you,

Katie
| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/5788984911297773568/353836035957850112?refcode=e20160320&refcode2=e20160320nd&amount=25)
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/5788984911297773568/281778441919922176).

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

name: urgent@murphyforflorida.com
subject: Rubio's replacement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| [](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2374/738133e4/347854dd/7f8212d9/889852636/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160318_a?refcode=pme160318_m&recurring=true&amount=25.00")
---
Friend -- Marco Rubio pinned all of his presidential hopes on his home state of Florida. It didn't turn out well.

With him rejected in Florida and out of the running, now's our chance! [**Will you pitch in to replace Rubio with Patrick and turn the Senate blue again?**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2374/738133e4/347854dd/7f8212aa/889852636/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160318z?recurring=true&amount=25.00")

This week reminds us again why it's so important that we put Democrats in charge of the Senate. President Obama has named his Supreme Court nominee, but Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans are refusing to hold hearings or _even meet with him._

Americans are tired of this outrageous obstruction. It's time Floridians are represented by someone who shares our values and is focused on results.

[**If you 're ready to replace Rubio and retake the Senate, contribute now!**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2374/738133e4/347854dd/7f8212aa/889852636/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160318z?recurring=true&amount=25.00")

Thanks,

Team Murphy

| | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2374/738133e4/347854dd/7f8212da/889852636/VEsC/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/")

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: Am I still a "fringe" candidate?
body:
#
Dear Sisters and Brothers,
The vast levels of income and wealth inequality that we are seeing today did not come down from the heavens -- they came about as a result of policy decisions that work against the interests of the American people. And together, we have the power to move our country in a different direction.
We can achieve health care as a right for all people. We can create decent paying jobs. And we can make sure that every person in this country gets the education they need and desire.
Despite what the corporate media and the political establishment might have you believe, these are not utopian ideas. But they won't happen unless we stand up and fight back.
**This Tuesday, three more states will have their say in this presidential primary and we have the chance to do well in all of them.** Let's show the political establishment that when we stand together, there is nothing we cannot accomplish.
[**Make a $3 contribution to our campaign today to say you are ready to stand up to the billionaire class and transform America.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/no-longer-fringe?refcode=em160320s1-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/no-longer-fringe?refcode=em160320s1-full")
Almost 11 months ago when I announced that I would run for president, the corporate media wrote me off as a "fringe candidate."
Well, I think the corporate media would agree that a lot has happened in the past 11 months. We have won nine states, and came very close in others. We have received more than 5.7 million individual contributions to our campaign from nearly 2 million people. And we have hundreds of thousands of volunteers across the country making calls and knocking on doors.
**What we are doing is building a movement of people who are prepared to stand up and fight back against the status quo.** The same old, same old establishment ideas are not enough. That is why I need you to join me in this effort before Arizona, Idaho, and Utah vote on Tuesday.
[**Add your $3 contribution now to send a message that this country belongs to all of us, and that it's past time our government started working for the people it is elected to serve.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/no-longer-fringe?refcode=em160320s1-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/no-longer-fringe?refcode=em160320s1-full")
The stakes in this election couldn't be any higher. Either we continue with the status quo, or we come together to shape a brighter future for our kids and our grandkids.
Thank you for your support, sisters and brothers. I have always said I cannot do this alone, and I'm glad to have you by my side.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/no-longer-fringe?refcode=em160320s1-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/no-longer-fringe?refcode=em160320s1-full")**

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: The real stories behind more than one million donors:

body:

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjUwMjE2MDES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzYzMjc4OTM2S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjUwMjE2MDES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzYzMjc4OTM2S0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=18&ms=MjUwMjE2MDES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzYzMjc4OTM2S0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjUwMjE2MDES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzYzMjc4OTM2S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjUwMjE2MDES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzYzMjc4OTM2S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjUwMjE2MDES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzYzMjc4OTM2S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjUwMjE2MDES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzYzMjc4OTM2S0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=19&ms=MjUwMjE2MDES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzYzMjc4OTM2S0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjUwMjE2MDES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzYzMjc4OTM2S0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjUwMjE2MDES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzYzMjc4OTM2S0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: BernieSanders.com
subject: This is the week we cut into the lead
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers -
In less than a week, voters in Washington will head to caucus locations across the state to make their choice in the Democratic primary. So Bernie and Hillary Clinton are heading there on Tuesday for dueling events.
Bernie is speaking at an arena that holds more than 17,000 people, free of charge. Hillary Clinton is going with a more ... expensive event, one that costs as much as **$50,000 in bundled fundraising to meet her at a private reception.**
Here's the truth: Bernie doesn't go around begging millionaires and billionaires for campaign contributions because he believes you can't change a corrupt political system by taking its money. This campaign is funded by working Americans, and it's an important week for all of us.
Tomorrow we find out the results from Democrats Abroad where we should do well. Democrats in three states make their choices for the nominee on Tuesday, and Washington caucuses on Saturday. It's an important stretch, and that's why Bernie wants me to ask:
[**Contribute $3 to Bernie 's campaign today and we're going to have a very, very good week, reclaim a number of delegates, and continue on our path toward the nomination.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/a-big-week-ahead?refcode=em160320-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/a-big-week-ahead?refcode=em160320-full")
Late last week, Bernie drew an enormous crowd of 14,000 in Utah. Huge audiences have showed up to watch him speak at multiple events in Arizona, and he's spent considerable time in Idaho as well.
Meanwhile, Hillary Clinton has taken a number of days off the campaign trail to raise money. When you contribute to emails like this one, it allows Bernie to spend his time doing what candidates for the highest office in the land should be doing: talking to voters. [**That 's why your $3 contribution today is so important -- it gives us a real advantage in states where Bernie can spend a good amount of time.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/a-big-week-ahead?refcode=em160320-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/a-big-week-ahead?refcode=em160320-full")
We've had this week marked on the calendar from the beginning of the campaign because this is when the map shifts dramatically in our favor. We're excited to share some big victories with you in the next few days, and if you continue to stand with Bernie, we can win this nomination.
In solidarity,
Jeff Weaver
Campaign Manager
Bernie 2016
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/a-big-week-ahead?refcode=em160320-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/a-big-week-ahead?refcode=em160320-full")**

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").
